input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.6.3.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.6.3.6
            TITLE: the front hoop braces must be straight, without any bends

            CONTENT:
            rule F.6.3.6: The Front Hoop Braces must be straight, without any bends
F.6.3.6 The Front Hoop Braces must be straight, without any bends

final_answer: The Front Hoop Braces must be straight, without any bends
